site.name: VeteransLedger
site.description: A comprehensive historical archive documenting the military, political, and human history of the Axis powers during the Second World War.

disclaimer.text: VeteransLedger is a personal historical archive maintained for educational purposes only. All content is presented with strict historical objectivity. This archive neither promotes nor endorses the ideologies, regimes, or actions documented herein.

contact.infoText: For inquiries, corrections, document submissions, or collaboration requests, please reach out directly.
contact.guidanceText: Please provide a detailed message including relevant historical information, corrections, archival inquiries, or collaboration details.

cookieBanner.text: This archive uses only essential session cookies for navigation and theme preferences. No tracking or analytics cookies are used.
